_comment: Manual sign-offs: dated human judgments the runner can't automate. In distribution mode (project_type=docs) the only applicable manual rule is CTX-04; TEST-03/04 now scope to code repos and skip here. Review and re-date before merge.

CTX-04.note: n/a — no frozen/consolidated/LOCKED docs in this repo. REFERENCE.md is a hand-maintained reference (its rule table is regenerated from rules.json) and carries no supersede banner because nothing here is superseded.
